task.title: 11 How to install security updates

abstract.p: Security updates are also known as windows updates as the update the windows operating system.
The updates are cumulative and therefore contain all previously fixed issues.
Windows updates can either be downloaded from the Canon website and installed manually or downloaded directly to the machine via ORS.
Preferred is that the customer executes the installation of the security update himself.

section.title: Configuration of windows updates via ORS
section.p: The configuration of automatic downloading and automatic installation are described in the operation guide.

section.title: Windows updates in case the system is not connected to ORS
section.p: The manual procedure for download and installation is described in the operation guide.

section.title: New Windows updates and new firmware updates
section.p: In case a firmware update is planned and also a Windows update is required, first execute the firmware update.
The firmware update might already contain the Windows update and a (re-)install of the firmware also removes all previously installed updates.
